migrations.name: create_signal_shadow_store_v1
statements:
CREATE TABLE internal_signal_calculations (
    calculation_id TEXT PRIMARY KEY,
    strategy_id TEXT NOT NULL,
    strategy_version INTEGER NOT NULL CHECK (strategy_version > 0),
    configuration_hash TEXT NOT NULL,
    instrument_id TEXT NOT NULL,
    source_bar_id TEXT NOT NULL,
    source_bar_revision INTEGER NOT NULL CHECK (source_bar_revision > 0),
    source_con_id INTEGER NOT NULL CHECK (source_con_id > 0),
    source_local_symbol TEXT NOT NULL,
    signal_bar_ts INTEGER NOT NULL,
    signal_bar_utc TEXT NOT NULL,
    calculated_at_utc TEXT NOT NULL,
    status TEXT NOT NULL CHECK (status IN ('SIGNAL', 'NO_SIGNAL')),
    event_id TEXT,
    payload_json TEXT NOT NULL,
    UNIQUE (
        strategy_id,
        strategy_version,
        configuration_hash,
        instrument_id,
        source_bar_id
    )
)

CREATE INDEX internal_signal_calculations_time_idx
ON internal_signal_calculations (
    instrument_id,
    signal_bar_ts
)

CREATE TABLE internal_signal_events (
    event_id TEXT PRIMARY KEY,
    calculation_id TEXT NOT NULL UNIQUE,
    strategy_id TEXT NOT NULL,
    strategy_version INTEGER NOT NULL CHECK (strategy_version > 0),
    configuration_hash TEXT NOT NULL,
    instrument_id TEXT NOT NULL,
    source_bar_id TEXT NOT NULL,
    signal_bar_ts INTEGER NOT NULL,
    signal_bar_utc TEXT NOT NULL,
    created_at_utc TEXT NOT NULL,
    direction TEXT NOT NULL CHECK (direction IN ('LONG', 'SHORT')),
    payload_json TEXT NOT NULL,
    FOREIGN KEY (calculation_id)
        REFERENCES internal_signal_calculations(calculation_id)
)

CREATE INDEX internal_signal_events_time_idx
ON internal_signal_events (
    instrument_id,
    signal_bar_ts
)

CREATE TABLE internal_signal_state (
    instrument_id TEXT PRIMARY KEY,
    last_source_bar_id TEXT NOT NULL,
    last_signal_bar_ts INTEGER NOT NULL,
    last_calculation_id TEXT NOT NULL,
    last_event_id TEXT,
    last_success_at_utc TEXT NOT NULL,
    FOREIGN KEY (last_calculation_id)
        REFERENCES internal_signal_calculations(calculation_id)
)

CREATE VIEW public_signal_calculations_v1 AS
SELECT
    calculation_id,
    strategy_id,
    strategy_version,
    configuration_hash,
    instrument_id,
    source_bar_id,
    source_bar_revision,
    source_con_id,
    source_local_symbol,
    signal_bar_ts,
    signal_bar_utc,
    calculated_at_utc,
    status,
    event_id,
    payload_json
FROM internal_signal_calculations

CREATE VIEW public_signal_events_v1 AS
SELECT
    event_id,
    calculation_id,
    strategy_id,
    strategy_version,
    configuration_hash,
    instrument_id,
    source_bar_id,
    signal_bar_ts,
    signal_bar_utc,
    created_at_utc,
    direction,
    payload_json
FROM internal_signal_events

CREATE VIEW public_signal_latest_v1 AS
SELECT c.*
FROM internal_signal_state AS s
JOIN internal_signal_calculations AS c
  ON c.calculation_id = s.last_calculation_id
